description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a classic, slightly bulging cylindrical shape, reinforced by two wide, dark metal hoops studded with round rivets near the top and bottom. The wood staves are vertically aligned, featuring a rich, reddish-brown grain that gives the barrel a robust and aged appearance. On one side, there is a prominent black silhouette of a sailing ship, adding a nautical or historical touch to the design. The interior appears hollow, suggesting it is meant to store or transport goods or liquids. The metal bands and rivets provide structural integrity and a rugged, utilitarian look. The overall finish is matte with visible wood texture, and the barrel is open at the top, lacking any lid or cover.
description: A wooden barrel with dark metal hoops, visible wood grain, and a black ship emblem on one side. The barrel is open-topped and reinforced with riveted metal bands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden barrel with metal hoops and a black ship emblem prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Side view of the barrel, showing the wood grain and metal hoops but no emblem or markings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with uninterrupted wood grain and metal hoops.
description_view_3: Rear angled view, displaying the wood texture and metal hoops, with no visible emblem.
